ListItem.Para: Inoperative valve is locked closed.
Crossfeed valve is verified to operate normally before each departure.
Alternate procedures are used for fuel balancing.
Appropriate performance adjustments are applied..

Note.Para: Use Boeing Onboard Performance Tool (OPT) to determine take-off weight and/or landing weight as it affects aircraft performance.
After this task is complete, the airplane can only be refueled in the manual fueling operation mode from the refuel control panel (RCP)

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Lock the inoperative defuel/isolation valve closed and verify the crossfeed valve operates normally (AMM DDG 28-26-01).

ListItem.Para: Lock the inoperative defuel/isolation valve closed.
For left defuel/isolation valve inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
DEFUEL VLV CLOSE-L
DEFUEL VLV OPEN-L
For right defuel/isolation valve inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
DEFUEL VLV CLOSE-R
DEFUEL VLV OPEN-R
Open and deactivate the landing gear doors.
Gain access to the defuel/isolation valves in the main gear wheel well.
Disconnect, cap and stow the inoperative defuel/isolation valve electrical connector.
Lock the inoperative defuel/isolation valve closed.
Close the landing gear doors.
Verify crossfeed valve operates normally. (Required by AD 2019-19-10)
Gain access to the crossfeed valve in the main gear wheel well.
Set Fuel Control Panel (P5) CROSSFEED switch to ON and visually confirm the valve drive moves from the closed (C) position to the open (O) position.
Set Fuel Control Panel (P5) CROSSFEED switch to OFF and visually confirm the valve drive moves from the open (O) position to closed (C) position.

Note.Para: For one or both defuel/isolation valves inoperative, the fuel balance system will be inoperative.
The associated main tank fuel jettison will be inoperative. The Fuel Synoptic will incorrectly indicate jettison flow from the associated main tank during fuel jettison.

ListItem.Para: For both valves inoperative, limit the takeoff weight to the maximum climb limited landing weight at the departure airport, plus center tank fuel, plus 2600 lb (1179 kg).
Prior to each flight, verify crossfeed valve operates normally. (Required by AD 2019-19-10)
Set Fuel Control Panel (P5) CROSSFEED switch to ON and after 15 seconds, confirm FUEL CROSSFEED advisory message does not display.
Set Fuel Control Panel (P5) CROSSFEED switch to OFF and after 15 seconds, confirm FUEL CROSSFEED advisory message does not display.
For fuel balancing, do the FUEL BALANCE SYS Non-Normal Checklist. (Required by AD 2019-19-10)
